case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER/TAX VS. INSURANCE PERSONNEL SERVICE INC.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT INSURANCE PERSONNEL SERVICE INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
